# Support

## Questions and general discussion

For questions about how the project works, ideas you want to discuss before opening an issue,
or general conversation with the maintainer team, use GitHub Discussions:

https://github.com/cad-accessibility/cad-a11y/discussions

## Bugs and feature requests

Use the issue templates to report a bug or request a feature:

https://github.com/cad-accessibility/cad-a11y/issues/new/choose

Please check existing issues before opening a new one — your question may already have an answer.

## Security vulnerabilities

Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.
Follow the process described in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md).
